system.description:
You have become an expert in both the terms of your own bargain and the terms of bargains in general, and can use both to your advantage. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma increases by 1, to a maximum of 20.

  • Choose a skill from Arcana or Religion that you are proficient with. It gains an expertise die and your maximum expertise die size for the selected skill becomes a d10.

  • You gain proficiency with the Culture skill or an expertise die if you are already proficient. You also gain the laws skill specialty if you do not already have it or another Culture skill specialty if you do. It does not count against your skill specialties known.

  • You gain an additional benefit based on your pact boon:

    • If you have @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.6co2rqjh9npjg3eb]{Pact of the Blade}, you learn a cantrip of the Attack, Protection, or Weaponry school and an additional spell of up to 4th level of the Attack, Protection, or Weaponry school.

    • If you have @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.f2mfiz8spijbzs6h]{Pact of the Chain}, you learn a cantrip of the Beasts, Communication, or Summoning school and an additional spell of up to 4th level of the Beasts, Communication, or Summoning school.

    • If you have @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.2dp9b4a11fuxjwbc]{Pact of the Tome}, you learn a cantrip of the Affliction, Knowledge, or Obscurement school and an additional spell of up to 4th level of the Affliction, Knowledge, or Obscurement school.
system.prerequisite: 8 levels in warlock, Bolstered Bargainer feat, no levels in non-warlock classes at the time of feat acquisition
